So I have seen some agents for example try to measure how long your context is by taking the number of characters in the entire context and dividing that by four to figure out how many tokens approximately are there Now that of course I seen some agents do that, especially at the beginning when you don't have a response from the LLM yet, and that seems to work. However, Pi does not do that at all. It just relies on the feedback that the response from the LLM gives you. It just assumes that on the start, you're not going to send a super long message anyways.
